commands.cmd: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry-availability.test.ts

summary: Repaired duplicate same-product recipe allocation with one deterministic calculation-only stock pool. Projected demand now exposes covered, definitive shortage, and uncertain states with nullable shortage math and explicit approximate/incompatible reasons. Added semantic date validation, planner presentation, docs, and regressions while preserving non-mutation and mapping attribution.
